expected.notes: F-1 student with on-campus employment used Sprintax (not TurboTax or H&R Block), so rule does not fire despite student track context.

probe_intent:
Generate a synthetic case where the engine must NOT fire rule 'student_wrong_tax_software', but that structurally resembles a case that WOULD fire it. Produce a case where ONE of the rule's conditions is deliberately not satisfied while the others are. Rule conditions:
  - answers.income_reporting in ['turbotax', 'hr_block']
No real PII or real-looking government identifiers.
